archetype: Organic & Earthy (Modified for Water Theme: Matte Sand + Deep Ocean)

core_principles: Calm and Functional: The app must feel like a breath of fresh air, not another stressful task list.
Flexible Tracking: Focus on recovery and positive reinforcement, shifting away from rigid guilt-inducing streaks.
Thumb-Optimized Navigation: Floating bottom actions, easily accessible with one hand.
Tactile Feedback: Use liquid glass and subtle depth (soft UI) to make logging water satisfying.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tight with 'tracking-tight'.

primary.description: Used for water progress, main CTAs, and active states.

accent.description: Used sparingly for streaks, badges, and important notifications to contrast the calm blue.

motion_and_interactions.water_wave: Use Framer Motion to create a rising water effect. Animate border-radius between 40% and 60% while spinning slowly to simulate a fluid wave.
motion_and_interactions.button_press: Elastic bounce scale (0.95) on tap to provide tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Soft fade and slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) to keep the flow uninterrupted.
motion_and_interactions.glass_nav: The bottom navigation bar must be floating and use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl).

1_Onboarding.purpose: Collect user data for smart water calculation and sleep hours.
ui_elements: Inputs: 'Seu Peso (kg)', 'Idade', 'Nível de Atividade (Sedentário, Moderado, Ativo)'.
Sleep Settings: 'Horário de dormir' e 'Horário de acordar'.
CTA: 'Gerar Minha Meta' (Calculates goal, usually ~35ml per kg).

2_Home.purpose: Main dashboard showing daily progress and quick-add actions.
ui_elements: Hero Progress: A large circular or cup-shaped container showing the wave animation filling up. Text inside: '1500ml / 2500ml'.
Subtitle: 'Faltam 1000ml para a sua meta diária'.
Quick Add Bento Grid: 4 buttons (200ml, 300ml, 500ml, Personalizado) styled as soft tactile pills or squares with water drop icons.
Status: 'Notificações pausadas (Dormindo)' if current time is within sleep hours.
Chart: Recharts BarChart showing the last 7 days of consumption vs goal line.
Badge Grid: Unlockable medals (use the golden medal image here). Ex: 'Primeiro Gole', 'Semana Perfeita'.
Profile Edit: Update weight to recalculate goal.

components_strategy.bottom_navigation: Floating fixed bottom bar, rounded-full, glassmorphism background. Icons for Home, History, Achievements, Settings.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn UI customized: large padding (h-14), rounded-2xl, soft background (#F1F5F9), no harsh borders. Focus ring in #90E0EF.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Remove grid lines for a cleaner look. Bars should have rounded tops (radius 8px) and use the primary gradient.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone style for a premium soft look).

water_drop_hero.description: Minimalist clear water drop. Use this as an avatar placeholder or hero background texture with low opacity.

water_texture_bg.description: Calm rippling blue water surface. Excellent for the top header background or an immersive history chart background.

achievement_badge.description: Gold medal with red ribbon. Use this in the Achievements (Conquistas) screen for unlocked badges.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT use generic purple or standard dark themes.
Implement the UI using a mobile-first approach (max-w-md mx-auto) to simulate the React Native Expo app within the web browser.
The texts must be strictly in Portuguese (pt-BR) as defined in screens_and_flow.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='quick-add-200ml').
Use Framer Motion to create a fluid, calming liquid wave animation for the Home screen progress tracker.
Ensure the layout has generous padding (p-6 or p-8) and uses rounded corners generously to feel soft and approachable.
